sha.name: Viva Garden Serviced Residence
sha.detail: Located just a stone’s throw away from the city’s hustle and bustle to offer you a peaceful, yet convenient living experience  in our serviced apartment that is uncommon elsewhere in Bangkok.At Viva Garden, you will never miss your important agenda. With just 2 minutes walk to Bangchak BTS Station, the skytrain will take you to the city center within 10 to 20 minutes, avoiding Bangkok’s traffic jam.Delight yourself in our spacious rooms with a private balcony overlooking a less busy part of Bangkok and enjoy our great in-room amenities, various facilities, and exceptional service from our team of friendly staffs.

sha.name: Urbana Sathorn Hotel
sha.detail:
It is not just the convenient location in the center of Bangkok that makes Urbana Sathorn the number one accommodation choice for discerning travelers. Whether you are in Bangkok on business or for pleasure, you and your family’s needs are fully taken care of by our friendly and helpful staff, world class services, state-of-the-art facilities, luxurious 5-star accommodation, and the attention to every detail that makes Urbana Sathorn your perfect central Bangkok accommodation choice.

Ideally situated near the Silom Road business district in the center of Bangkok, Urbana Sathorn offers luxurious accommodation and 5-star service just minutes away from the nearest BTS (sky-train) station for easy access to the city’s finest restaurants, malls and nightlife."

sha.name: Triple Two Silom Hotel
sha.detail:
Triple Two Silom is an innovative and exclusive business class boutique hotel, with the contemporary oriental decorative style, blended with a combination mixed of East Meets West concept. Choose our 75 luxury rooms. We providing high quality personalized service in a relaxed atmosphere for both business and leisure travelers. 
The hotel is located in Bangkok’s Central Business District, along Silom Road, cloes to awide selection of entertainment venues walk to Silom Night Market. The hotel also has easy access to public transportation with BTS Skytrain and MRT subway being only 10 minutes walk away."

sha.name: TK. PALACE HOTEL & CONVENTION
sha.detail: TK. Palace Hotel & Convention is a 4-star  luxury hotel of modern style located on Chaeng Watthana Road, in the central business district (North of Bangkok), with convenient access to Government Office Complex, IMPACT Exhibition Center, Don Mueang International Airport, well-known shopping mall as well as various tourist attractions.The hotel is an ideal destination for business and leisure travellers, featuring  beautifully decorated guest rooms and  function rooms suitable for all significant meeting, social gathering, exhibition, convention and wedding events.The hotel is a perfect destination for wedding celebrations. Our Professional Wedding Planner & Designer team is ready to provide “Wedding Solutions” to make the most memorable day for brides and grooms.With our personalized service concept, you will have an unique experiences from our Thai hospitality at TK. Palace Hotel & Convention.

sha.name: The Siam Heritage Hotel
sha.detail:
THE SIAM HERITAGE HOTEL
""Your Home Away from Home"" Welcome to the most beautiful ""Boutique"" Traditional Thai Life ""Thailand"" in Bangkok, Thailand. The ""Siam Heritage Boutique Suites"", a stylish Boutique class, perfectly located in the heart of Bangkok on Surawong Road, offers 73 beautifully decorated rooms in Authentic Lanna and Middle Rattanakosin Era including suites and apartments in Thai style. Upon entering The ""Siam Heritage Boutique Suites"", you will be charmed and enchanted by the simple pleasures of traditional Thai living coupled with all the conveniences and modern comforts and the warmth of service and Thai hospitality."

data.name: The Royal Chiang Mai Golf Club

sha.name: The Royal Chiangmai Golf Club
sha.detail: The Royal Chiang Mai Golf Course was designed by Peter Thompson, five times British Open Champion. The design is reminiscent of a traditional British Parkland course with some interesting “links” additions. The course is heavily tree-lined and water hazards are in play on almost every hole. The “Rough” is true to the meaning of the word.From the very back “blue” tees the course measures over 7,200 yards and can be a severe test, but from the men’s “white” tees the course is pleasant and relaxing. Bunkers use local sand from The Mae Ping river. The greens are Tiff Dwarf Bermuda with Bermuda 419 and Zoysia fairways. The course has a driving range and two practice putting and chipping greens.

sha.name: The Peninsula Bangkok Hotel
sha.detail: Experience an urban retreat stay at The Peninsula Bangkok showcasing Chao Phraya river views. Take a journey through the concept of Health & Harmony designed to offer mind and body relaxation and rejuvenation at The Peninsula Spa. Meanwhile, explore the award-winning restaurants at River Caf? & Terrace, The Lobby, Mei Jiang and Thiptara offering Thai and International cuisines with fresh ingredients and a selection of healthy recipes.

sha.name: The Emerald Hotel
sha.detail: Opt for a convenient location near MRT subway Huai khwang station in one of the Bangkok’s most vibrant districts – Ratchadapisek. Emerald Hotel Bangkok is the perfect base from which to explore Bangkok during day and night, a short distance to the CBD, Ratchada Rot Fai Train Night Market, the Street Ratchada Avenue, Chatuchak Market, RCA, Onyx pub and just 25-minute drive to both Suvarnabhumi and Donmuang Airports.Elegant interiors, soundproof windows and free Wi-Fi can be found in our 600 rooms and suites to ensure that every stay offers maximum value with minimal fuss. Dine on delectable specialties from International, Seafood, Thai, Chinese and Japanese delicacies in three restaurants and a bar.

sha.name: Thana City Country Club
sha.detail: Thana City Country club is located at KM14 on the Bang Na- Trat Highway, just 25 minutes from downtown Bangkok and a mere 10 minutes from Suvarnabhumi International Airport. A complete sports and leisure complex with serene, natural surroundings and a comprehensive range of facilities for leisure seekers and sports enthusiasts alike, the club’s modern design was created with rest and relaxation in mind and is perfectly tailored to suit the needs of our varied guests.
